title: Bob Fluid Translator
description: A mod that bridges NTM's fluid system and Forge's fluid system.
body:
This mod adds a couple of machines which let you convert fluids from [HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ntm) to Forge's fluid system and viceversa.

Also it doesn't take into account the mechanics of safe storage from NTM (hot fluids, acids, antimatter), so keep in mind that it changes the game balance.

Check out the [wiki](https://github.com/Ezzocorbi/bob-fluid-translator/wiki) on GitHub to find out how to use it.

It requires HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod to run.
